intro: Gymnodes spicata, also known as Wild Cucumber or Spiny Bitter Cucumber, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The health benefits of Gymnodes spicata include its traditional use in treating fever, diarrhea, and various gastrointestinal issues due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
